# J&L Security

> Professional security system installation and maintenance across Essex and Greater London. Established 2011. SSAIB approved, CHAS accredited, FIA member, BAFE certified.

## Services

- Burglar Alarm Installation and Maintenance (Texecom, Pyronix, RISCO)
- CCTV System Installation and Monitoring (Uniview, 4K capable)
- Fire Alarm Installation and Servicing (BS 5839-1 commercial, BS 5839-6 domestic and HMO)
- Access Control and Door Entry Systems (Paxton, Comelit)
- Security and Emergency Lighting (LED, PIR, BS 5266-1)

## Service Areas

Essex: Brentwood, Chelmsford, Basildon, Romford, Ilford, Hornchurch, Upminster, Barking, Dagenham, Redbridge, Harlow, Epping, and surrounding areas.

Greater London: Enfield, Stratford, Canary Wharf, Greenwich, and surrounding boroughs.

## Contact

- Phone: 0204 538 5925
- Phone (secondary): 0208 220 4770
- Email: info@jandlsecurity.co.uk
- WhatsApp: +44 204 538 5925
- Address: Jubilee House No3, The Drive, Great Warley, Brentwood CM13 3FR
- Emergency: 24/7 callouts available

## Accreditations

SSAIB Approved, CHAS Accredited, FIA Member, BAFE Certified

## Key Facts

- Established 2011
- Serving homes and businesses
- Free, no-obligation security surveys
- Same-day survey appointments available
- 24/7 emergency response
- Intruder alarm systems from approximately GBP 450 plus VAT (indicative)

## Indicative Installed Costs (UK, 2026)

These are indicative ranges only. All quotations follow a free site survey.

- Burglar alarm (bell-only): approximately GBP 350 to 600 installed
- Burglar alarm (speech dialler / self-monitored): approximately GBP 500 to 900 installed
- Burglar alarm (monitored Grade 2 or 3, ARC, police-response eligible): approximately GBP 700 to 1,800 installed plus GBP 15 to 35 per month monitoring
- Fire alarm (HMO Grade D1, 5-bedroom): approximately GBP 350 to 600 installed
- Fire alarm (HMO Grade A panel-controlled, larger HMO): approximately GBP 1,200 to 2,500 installed
- Fire alarm annual servicing: from approximately GBP 120 per year (Grade D), GBP 180 to 300 per year (Grade A)
- Domestic CCTV (2-camera basic system): from approximately GBP 850 plus VAT installed

## Blog

- [Burglar Alarm Cost UK 2026: Installation Prices Explained](https://jandlsecurity.co.uk/blog/burglar-alarm-cost-uk-2026): A practical UK pricing guide for bell-only, speech dialler, and monitored systems with year-1 cost summary table.
- [CCTV Installation Guide for Essex Homeowners](https://jandlsecurity.co.uk/blog/cctv-installation-guide-essex): Camera types, resolution, storage, remote viewing, and ICO guidance for domestic CCTV in Essex.
- [HMO Fire Alarm Requirements (BS 5839 Explained)](https://jandlsecurity.co.uk/blog/hmo-fire-alarm-requirements-bs5839): BS 5839-6 grades and categories, pricing transparency, FAQs, and compliance for HMO landlords.
- [How to Choose a Security Company](https://jandlsecurity.co.uk/blog/how-to-choose-security-company): Seven practical questions covering accreditations, insurance, pricing, and aftercare.
- [Insurance-Approved Burglar Alarms UK 2026](https://jandlsecurity.co.uk/blog/insurance-approved-burglar-alarms-uk-2026): What UK home insurers actually require for premium discount and police-response eligibility.
- [Wired vs Wireless Burglar Alarms in Essex](https://jandlsecurity.co.uk/blog/wired-vs-wireless-burglar-alarms-essex): Decision guide for Essex homes covering installation cost, expansion, and property suitability.
- [Business CCTV and the ICO: 2026 Compliance Guide](https://jandlsecurity.co.uk/blog/business-cctv-ico-compliance-uk-2026): ICO Code of Practice, signage, retention, and DPIA guidance for UK business CCTV.
- [Why Does My Burglar Alarm Keep Going Off?](https://jandlsecurity.co.uk/blog/why-does-my-burglar-alarm-keep-going-off): Common false-alarm causes and fixes for domestic intruder alarm systems.
